item-description: Set of 3 organic bamboo cutting boards in different sizes. Anti-bacterial and knife-friendly surface.
5-piece stainless steel mixing bowl set with non-slip base and measurement markings.
Set of 2 non-stick silicone baking mats. Food-grade, reusable, and easy to clean.
Pre-seasoned cast iron skillet with helper handle. Oven safe to 500°F.
One-touch electric spice and coffee grinder with stainless steel blades.
